creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Wed Apr 24 17:54:05 2013
New Revision: 316461
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/316461

Log:
  - Update to 3.5.1

Modified:

  head/devel/gitolite/distinfo
  head/devel/gitolite/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/gitolite/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/gitolite/Makefile	Wed Apr 24 17:50:58 2013	(r316460)
+++ head/devel/gitolite/Makefile	Wed Apr 24 17:54:05 2013	(r316461)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	gitolite
-PORTVERSION=	3.4
+PORTVERSION=	3.5.1
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://milki.github.com/${PORTNAME}/ \

Modified: head/devel/gitolite/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/gitolite/distinfo	Wed Apr 24 17:50:58 2013	(r316460)
+++ head/devel/gitolite/distinfo	Wed Apr 24 17:54:05 2013	(r316461)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

+SHA256 (gitolite-3.5.1.tar.gz) = b527e90ea6aa0f0d5496b3e520cc4a461b130a91b1b284ffee1f20865fada7cf
+SIZE (gitolite-3.5.1.tar.gz) = 128763

Modified: head/devel/gitolite/pkg-plist
==============================================================================

+++ head/devel/gitolite/pkg-plist	Wed Apr 24 17:54:05 2013	(r316461)
@@ -45,6 +45,7 @@ libexec/gitolite/commands/info
 libexec/gitolite/commands/list-dangling-repos
 libexec/gitolite/commands/lock
 libexec/gitolite/commands/mirror
+libexec/gitolite/commands/owns
 libexec/gitolite/commands/perms
 libexec/gitolite/commands/print-default-rc
 libexec/gitolite/commands/push
@@ -74,6 +75,7 @@ libexec/gitolite/triggers/post-compile/u
 libexec/gitolite/triggers/post-compile/update-gitweb-access-list
 libexec/gitolite/triggers/post-compile/update-gitweb-daemon-from-options
 libexec/gitolite/triggers/renice
+libexec/gitolite/triggers/set-default-roles
 libexec/gitolite/triggers/upstream
 %%GITUSER%%@dirrmtry git
 @dirrm libexec/gitolite/triggers/post-compile
